'''√b-ch-t''' ('''kabachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macarize|macarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macarize|macarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √b-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabachat
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thibachat || jibachat || shibachat || kibachat
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthubachat || jujubachat || shushubachat || kukubachat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thubachat || jubachat || shubachat || kubachat
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thubachat || jubachat || shubachat || kubachat
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thebachat || jebachat || shebachat || kebachat
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothobachat || jojobachat || shoshobachat || kokobachat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thobachat || jobachat || shobachat || kobachat
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thobachat || jobachat || shobachat || kobachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || bachat || bachat || bachat || bachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || bachat || bachat || bachat || bachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || bachat || bachat || bachat || bachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || bachat || bachat || bachat || bachat
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæbachat || jæbachat || shæbachat || kæbachat
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathabachat || jajabachat || shashabachat || kakabachat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thabachat || jabachat || shabachat || kabachat
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thabachat || jabachat || shabachat || kabachat
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shabachat
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshabachat
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishabachat
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shabachatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshabachatnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishabachatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shabachatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshabachatnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishabachatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shabachatro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshabachatnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishabachatro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shabachatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshabachatnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishabachatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shabachatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshabachatnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishabachatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shabachatng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshabachatnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishabachatng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shabachatya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshabachatnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishabachatya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shabachatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshabachatnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishabachatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shabachatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshabachatnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishabachatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shabachatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabachatnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabachatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shabachatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshabachatnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabachatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shabachatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshabachatnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishabachatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shabachatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabachatnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabachatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shabachatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshabachatnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabachatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shabachatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshabachatnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishabachatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shabachatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshabachatnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishabachatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shabachatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshabachatnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabachatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shabachatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshabachatnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishabachatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shabachatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshabachatnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishabachatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shabachatmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabachatnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabachatmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
